title: Lemon strategy envelope
description: A shareable, versioned strategy document: metadata + a strategy (as lemon `source` text or a lowered `spec` Expr tree) + reproducibility hints. Contains NO market data — it references series names and a universe window only. The authoritative validator is `lemon check` (crates/lemon-lang); this schema mirrors it for external consumers.

format.description: Envelope format version. This build understands version 1.

source.description: Lemon source text. Exactly one of `source` / `spec` must be present.

spec.description: A lowered Expr tree. Exactly one of `source` / `spec` must be present. Validated against schema/lemon-spec.schema.json.

config.description: Engine config knobs (fees, slippage, delist, benchmark, bootstrap, …), interpreted by the engine/runner. Opaque here beyond being an object.

universe.description: Date window + universe hint the run should cover. Names/windows only — never embedded data.

symbols_hint.description: A named universe hint (e.g. "sp500") the runner resolves to symbols.

symbols.description: An explicit symbol list, if pinned.
